summary: Worked on large-scale web platform improvements across observability, performance, SEO, and commerce experiences. Focused on server-side rendering, AI-assisted engineering workflows, and web performance optimization at high page volume.
highlights: Architected and deployed a custom observability suite from scratch to bridge the gap between Grafana alerts and engineering response.
Automated the notification-to-incident pipeline with Codex and Terraform, reducing manual routing and lowering mean time to resolution.
Led implementation of server-rendered PDP commerce card pricing, eliminating client-side pricing delay and enabling immediate price visibility on page load.
Used Codex to accelerate codebase analysis and cross-stack implementation across Java, JSP, and frontend pricing flows while preserving client/server behavior parity.
Migrated Java development workflows to VS Code, enabling GitHub Copilot adoption and increasing AI-assisted coding adoption by 70%.
Refactored schema implementation from client-side to server-side across 150,000+ pages, improving structured data visibility and SEO performance.
Delivered a 15% increase in search rankings and a 12% improvement in indexability through SEO-focused technical changes.
Optimized mobile web performance for 200,000+ BID pages, reducing INP from 500ms to 180ms.
Refactored an image gallery library from client-side to server-side, reducing load times from 5 seconds to 2 seconds and improving user engagement by 25%.

summary: Built mobile and web product features across both frontend and backend systems, with a focus on user-facing modules and application infrastructure.
highlights: Developed user-facing features such as authentication, chat, and user settings for mobile and web applications.
Built applications using React, React Native, and Next.js.
Developed backend modules for recruiting and chat systems.
Worked with Ruby on Rails, AWS S3, RDS, and DynamoDB for mobile and web applications.
